prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body fashion cosplay portrait of Nico Robin as an elegant adult woman standing in a dark antique library. She has very long black wavy hair, sunglasses resting on top of her head, a confident relaxed posture, and is holding one open antique book with both hands as if reading. Her outfit is a deep navy cropped short-sleeve blouse with a wide popped collar, white trim, a small compass-like emblem on the chest, a plunging neckline, and a tied rose-pink sarong skirt with fringe and a high side slit revealing one leg, paired with glossy pink pointed high heels. The setting is a richly decorated old-world study with wooden bookshelves, framed classical paintings, an ornate chandelier overhead, a carved round wooden table, one upholstered chair, and warm candlelight; include exactly three visible lit candles on the table and one warm lamp or candle glow in the right background. Use moody cinematic lighting, warm amber highlights, deep shadows, shallow depth of field, luxurious vintage atmosphere, realistic skin texture, editorial photography composition, vertical 9:16 framing, full body visible from head to shoes, high detail, elegant and sensual but tasteful.
